<filename>vulnerable_api.py
<issue>sql_injection (CWE-89) in Java Spring Boot GET /api/key_records
<code>
@GetMapping("/api/key_records")
public ResponseEntity<List<Key>> findAll(@RequestParam(required=false) String filter) {
    String sql = "SELECT * FROM key_records" + (filter != null ? " WHERE " + filter : "");
    return ResponseEntity.ok(jdbc.queryForList(sql));
}
<fixed_code>
@GetMapping("/api/key_records")
public ResponseEntity<List<Key>> findAll(@RequestParam(required=false) String label) {
    if (label != null) {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(repo.findByLabel(label));
    }
    return ResponseEntity.ok(repo.findAll());
}

<issue>sql_injection (CWE-89) in C# ASP.NET Core GET /api/alerts/search
<code>
[HttpGet("search")]
public IActionResult Search([FromQuery] string q)
{
    var sql = $"SELECT * FROM alerts WHERE description LIKE '%{q}%'";
    var results = _context.Alerts.FromSqlRaw(sql).ToList();
    return Ok(results);
}
<fixed_code>
[HttpGet("search")]
public IActionResult Search([FromQuery] string q)
{
    var results = _context.Alerts.Where(x => x.Description.Contains(q)).ToList();
    return Ok(results);
}

<issue>sql_injection (CWE-89) in Python Django GET /api/vaults/
<code>
def load_vaults(request):
    q = request.GET.get('description', '')
    results = Vault.objects.raw("SELECT * FROM app_vaults WHERE description LIKE '%%" + q + "%%'")
    return JsonResponse([model_to_dict(r) for r in results], safe=False)
<fixed_code>
def find_vaults(request):
    q = request.GET.get('description', '')
    results = Vault.objects.filter(description__icontains=q)
    return JsonResponse([model_to_dict(r) for r in results], safe=False)

<filename>vulnerable_api.py
<issue>sql_injection (CWE-89) in Go Gin GET /api/workflow_records
<code>
func searchWorkflows(c *gin.Context) {
    q := c.Query("description")
    rows, _ := db.Query(fmt.Sprintf("SELECT * FROM workflow_records WHERE description LIKE '%%%s%%'", q))
    defer rows.Close()
    var results []Workflow
    for rows.Next() {
        var item Workflow
        rows.Scan(&item.ID, &item.Description)
        results = append(results, item)
    }
    c.JSON(200, results)
}
<fixed_code>
func searchWorkflows(c *gin.Context) {
    q := c.Query("description")
    rows, err := db.Query("SELECT * FROM workflow_records WHERE description LIKE ?", "%"+q+"%")
    if err != nil {
        c.JSON(500, gin.H{"error": "query failed"})
        return
    }
    defer rows.Close()
    var results []Workflow
    for rows.Next() {
        var item Workflow
        rows.Scan(&item.ID, &item.Description)
        results = append(results, item)
    }
    c.JSON(200, results)
}

<filename>vulnerable_api.py
<issue>sql_injection (CWE-89) in JavaScript Express.js GET /api/task_entries
<code>
app.get('/api/task_entries/:id', (req, res) => {
    const id = req.params.id;
    connection.query("SELECT * FROM task_entries WHERE id = " + id, (err, results) => {
        res.json(results[0]);
    });
});
<fixed_code>
app.get('/api/task_entries/:id', (req, res) => {
    const id = parseInt(req.params.id, 10);
    if (isNaN(id)) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid ID' });
    connection.query("SELECT * FROM task_entries WHERE id = ?", [id], (err, results) => {
        if (!results.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Not found' });
        res.json(results[0]);
    });
});

func searchTokens(c *gin.Context) {
    q := c.Query("description")
    rows, _ := db.Query(fmt.Sprintf("SELECT * FROM token_entries WHERE description LIKE '%%%s%%'", q))
    defer rows.Close()
    var results []Token
    for rows.Next() {
        var item Token
        rows.Scan(&item.ID, &item.Description)
        results = append(results, item)
    }
    c.JSON(200, results)
}
<fixed_code>
func searchTokens(c *gin.Context) {
    q := c.Query("description")
    rows, err := db.Query("SELECT * FROM token_entries WHERE description LIKE ?", "%"+q+"%")
    if err != nil {
        c.JSON(500, gin.H{"error": "query failed"})
        return
    }
    defer rows.Close()
    var results []Token
    for rows.Next() {
        var item Token
        rows.Scan(&item.ID, &item.Description)
        results = append(results, item)
    }
    c.JSON(200, results)
}

func searchPipelines(c *gin.Context) {
    q := c.Query("title")
    rows, _ := db.Query(fmt.Sprintf("SELECT * FROM pipeline_records WHERE title LIKE '%%%s%%'", q))
    defer rows.Close()
    var results []Pipeline
    for rows.Next() {
        var item Pipeline
        rows.Scan(&item.ID, &item.Title)
        results = append(results, item)
    }
    c.JSON(200, results)
}
<fixed_code>
func searchPipelines(c *gin.Context) {
    q := c.Query("title")
    rows, err := db.Query("SELECT * FROM pipeline_records WHERE title LIKE ?", "%"+q+"%")
    if err != nil {
        c.JSON(500, gin.H{"error": "query failed"})
        return
    }
    defer rows.Close()
    var results []Pipeline
    for rows.Next() {
        var item Pipeline
        rows.Scan(&item.ID, &item.Title)
        results = append(results, item)
    }
    c.JSON(200, results)
}

func searchSecrets(c *gin.Context) {
    q := c.Query("title")
    rows, _ := db.Query(fmt.Sprintf("SELECT * FROM secret_items WHERE title LIKE '%%%s%%'", q))
    defer rows.Close()
    var results []Secret
    for rows.Next() {
        var item Secret
        rows.Scan(&item.ID, &item.Title)
        results = append(results, item)
    }
    c.JSON(200, results)
}
<fixed_code>
func searchSecrets(c *gin.Context) {
    q := c.Query("title")
    rows, err := db.Query("SELECT * FROM secret_items WHERE title LIKE ?", "%"+q+"%")
    if err != nil {
        c.JSON(500, gin.H{"error": "query failed"})
        return
    }
    defer rows.Close()
    var results []Secret
    for rows.Next() {
        var item Secret
        rows.Scan(&item.ID, &item.Title)
        results = append(results, item)
    }
    c.JSON(200, results)
}

});

class AddressCreateView(LoginRequiredMixin, View):

        form = AddressForm(json.loads(request.body))

class AlbumCreateView(LoginRequiredMixin, View):
    def post(self, request):
        form = AlbumForm(json.loads(request.body))
        if not form.is_valid():

<code>
@app.route('/api/admin/workflow_items', methods=['DELETE'])
def purge_workflow_items():
    Workflow.query.delete()
    db.session.commit()
    return jsonify({'status': 'all deleted'})
<fixed_code>
@app.route('/api/admin/workflow_items', methods=['DELETE'])
@login_required
@admin_required
def purge_workflow_items():
    Workflow.query.delete()
    db.session.commit()
    return jsonify({'status': 'all deleted'})

<issue>information_disclosure, improper_error_handling (CWE-200, CWE-209) in Java Spring Boot GET /api/asset_data/{id}
<code>
@GetMapping("/api/asset_data/{id}")
public ResponseEntity<?> get(@PathVariable Long id) {
    try {
        return ResponseEntity.ok(repo.findById(id).orElseThrow());
    } catch (Exception e) {
        return ResponseEntity.status(500).body(Map.of(
            "error", e.getMessage(),
            "stack", Arrays.toString(e.getStackTrace()),
            "type", e.getClass().getName()
        ));
    }
}
<fixed_code>
@GetMapping("/api/asset_data/{id}")
public ResponseEntity<?> get(@PathVariable Long id) {
    return repo.findById(id)
        .map(ResponseEntity::ok)
        .orElse(ResponseEntity.notFound().build());
}

@ExceptionHandler(Exception.class)
public ResponseEntity<?> error(Exception e) {
    log.error("Error", e);
    return ResponseEntity.status(500).body(Map.of("error", "Internal error"));
}

<code>
@app.route('/api/pipelines/<int:pk>')
def get_pipeline(pk):
    try:
        pipeline = Pipeline.query.get(pk)
        return jsonify(pipeline.to_dict())
    except Exception as e:
        return jsonify({'error': str(e), 'traceback': traceback.format_exc()}), 500
<fixed_code>
@app.route('/api/pipelines/<int:pk>')
def get_pipeline(pk):
    pipeline = Pipeline.query.get_or_404(pk)
    return jsonify(pipeline.to_dict())

@app.errorhandler(500)
def server_error(e):
    app.logger.error(f'Server error: {e}')
    return jsonify({'error': 'Internal server error'}), 500

<filename>vulnerable_api.py
<issue>hardcoded_credentials, broken_authentication (CWE-798, CWE-287) in JavaScript Express.js POST /api/auth/login
<code>
const jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');
const JWT_SECRET = 'super-secret-jwt-8307';

app.post('/api/auth/login', (req, res) => {
    const user = users.find(u => u.email === req.body.email && u.password === req.body.password);
    if (!user) return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Bad creds' });
    const token = jwt.sign({ id: user.id, role: user.role }, JWT_SECRET);
    res.json({ token });
});
<fixed_code>
const jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');
const bcrypt = require('bcrypt');

app.post('/api/auth/login', rateLimit({ windowMs: 15*60*1000, max: 5 }), async (req, res) => {
    const user = await User.findOne({ email: req.body.email });
    if (!user || !await bcrypt.compare(req.body.password, user.passwordHash))
        return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Invalid credentials' });
    const token = jwt.sign({ id: user.id }, process.env.JWT_SECRET, { expiresIn: '1h' });
    res.json({ token });
});

<filename>vulnerable_api.py
<issue>hardcoded_credentials, broken_authentication (CWE-798, CWE-287) in JavaScript Express.js POST /api/auth/login
<code>
const jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');
const JWT_SECRET = 'super-secret-jwt-6533';

app.post('/api/auth/login', (req, res) => {
    const user = users.find(u => u.email === req.body.email && u.password === req.body.password);
    if (!user) return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Bad creds' });
    const token = jwt.sign({ id: user.id, role: user.role }, JWT_SECRET);
    res.json({ token });

<fixed_code>
const jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');
const bcrypt = require('bcrypt');

app.post('/api/auth/login', rateLimit({ windowMs: 15*60*1000, max: 5 }), async (req, res) => {
    const user = await User.findOne({ email: req.body.email });
    if (!user || !await bcrypt.compare(req.body.password, user.passwordHash))
        return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Invalid credentials' });
    const token = jwt.sign({ id: user.id }, process.env.JWT_SECRET, { expiresIn: '1h' });

<issue>eval_injection, code_injection (CWE-95) in Python Flask POST /api/discount_items/calc
<code>
@app.route('/api/discount_items/calc', methods=['POST'])
def calculate():
    expr = request.json.get('expression')
    result = eval(expr)
    return jsonify({'result': result})
<fixed_code>
@app.route('/api/discount_items/calc', methods=['POST'])
def calculate():
    import ast, operator
    ops = {ast.Add: operator.add, ast.Sub: operator.sub, ast.Mult: operator.mul, ast.Div: operator.truediv}
    expr = request.json.get('expression', '')
    tree = ast.parse(expr, mode='eval')
    # Only allow simple arithmetic
    for node in ast.walk(tree):
        if isinstance(node, ast.Call):
            return jsonify({'error': 'Functions not allowed'}), 400
    result = eval(compile(tree, '<str>', 'eval'), {"__builtins__": {}})
    return jsonify({'result': result})

<filename>vulnerable_api.py
<issue>unrestricted_file_upload, path_traversal (CWE-434, CWE-22) in Java Spring Boot POST /api/notification_items/upload
<code>
@PostMapping("/api/notification_items/upload")
public String upload(@RequestParam MultipartFile file) throws Exception {
    String path = "/uploads/notification_items/" + file.getOriginalFilename();
    file.transferTo(new File(path));
    return path;
}
<fixed_code>
@PostMapping("/api/notification_items/upload")
public String upload(@RequestParam MultipartFile file) throws Exception {
    String ext = FilenameUtils.getExtension(file.getOriginalFilename());
    if (!Set.of("jpg","png","pdf","csv").contains(ext)) throw new BadRequestException("Invalid type");
    if (file.getSize() > 10_000_000) throw new BadRequestException("Too large");
    String safeName = UUID.randomUUID() + "." + ext;
    file.transferTo(new File("/uploads/notification_items/" + safeName));
    return safeName;
}

        return jsonify({'error': 'Invalid file type'}), 400
    safe_name = str(uuid.uuid4()) + '.' + ext
    f.save(os.path.join('/uploads/flight_list', safe_name))
    return jsonify({'path': safe_name})

}

<issue>csrf, missing_authentication (CWE-352, CWE-306) in Python Django POST /api/events/webhook/
<code>
@csrf_exempt
def event_webhook(request):
    if request.method == 'POST':
        data = json.loads(request.body)
        Event.objects.create(**data)
        return JsonResponse({'status': 'ok'})
<fixed_code>
def event_webhook(request):
    if request.method != 'POST':
        return JsonResponse({'error': 'Method not allowed'}, status=405)
    if not verify_signature(request):
        return JsonResponse({'error': 'Invalid signature'}, status=403)
    form = EventWebhookForm(json.loads(request.body))
    if form.is_valid():
        form.save()
    return JsonResponse({'status': 'ok'})

@GetMapping("/api/schedule_records/{id}")

}
<fixed_code>
@GetMapping("/api/schedule_records/{id}")
@PreAuthorize("isAuthenticated()")
public Schedule get(@PathVariable Long id, @AuthenticationPrincipal User user) {

    return entity;
}

<code>
app.get('/api/video_list/:id', async (req, res) => {
    const item = await Video.findById(req.params.id);
    if (!item) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Not found' });
    res.json(item);
});
<fixed_code>
app.get('/api/video_list/:id', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
    const item = await Video.findOne({ _id: req.params.id, owner: req.user.id });
    if (!item) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Not found' });
    res.json(item);
});

<filename>vulnerable_api.py
<issue>idor, missing_authorization (CWE-639, CWE-862) in Python Flask GET /api/flight_items/{id}
<code>
@app.route('/api/flight_items/<int:pk>', methods=['GET'])
def find_flight(pk):
    current_flight = Flight.query.get_or_404(pk)
    return jsonify(current_flight.to_dict())
<fixed_code>
@app.route('/api/flight_items/<int:pk>', methods=['GET'])
@login_required
def find_flight(pk):
    current_flight = Flight.query.get_or_404(pk)
    if current_flight.owner_id != current_user.id:
        abort(403)
    return jsonify(current_flight.to_dict())

<filename>vulnerable_api.py
<issue>idor, missing_authorization (CWE-639, CWE-862) in Java Spring Boot GET /api/teams/{id}
<code>
@GetMapping("/api/teams/{id}")
public Team get(@PathVariable Long id) {
    return repo.findById(id).orElseThrow(() -> new ResponseStatusException(HttpStatus.NOT_FOUND));
}
<fixed_code>
@GetMapping("/api/teams/{id}")
@PreAuthorize("isAuthenticated()")
public Team get(@PathVariable Long id, @AuthenticationPrincipal User user) {
    Team entity = repo.findById(id).orElseThrow(() -> new ResponseStatusException(HttpStatus.NOT_FOUND));
    if (!entity.getOwnerId().equals(user.getId())) throw new AccessDeniedException("Forbidden");
    return entity;
}

<filename>vulnerable_api.py
<issue>path_traversal (CWE-22) in Java Spring Boot GET /api/ticket_data/{id}/attachment
<code>
@GetMapping("/api/ticket_data/{id}/attachment")
public ResponseEntity<Resource> download(@PathVariable Long id, @RequestParam String filename) {
    Path path = Paths.get("/uploads/ticket_data/" + filename);
    Resource resource = new UrlResource(path.toUri());
    return ResponseEntity.ok().body(resource);
}
<fixed_code>
@GetMapping("/api/ticket_data/{id}/attachment")
public ResponseEntity<Resource> download(@PathVariable Long id, @RequestParam String filename) {
    Path basePath = Paths.get("/uploads/ticket_data").toRealPath();
    Path filePath = basePath.resolve(filename).normalize().toRealPath();
    if (!filePath.startsWith(basePath)) {
        return ResponseEntity.status(403).build();
    }
    Resource resource = new UrlResource(filePath.toUri());
    return ResponseEntity.ok().body(resource);
}

<issue>path_traversal (CWE-22) in Python Flask GET /api/sensor_records/{id}/files
<code>
@app.route('/api/sensor_records/<int:pk>/files', methods=['GET'])
def get_file(pk):
    name = request.args.get('name')
    return send_file(f'/uploads/sensor_records/' + name)
<fixed_code>
@app.route('/api/sensor_records/<int:pk>/files', methods=['GET'])
def get_file(pk):
    name = request.args.get('name')
    safe = os.path.realpath(os.path.join('/uploads/sensor_records', os.path.basename(name)))
    if not safe.startswith('/uploads/sensor_records/'):
        abort(403)
    if not os.path.isfile(safe):
        abort(404)
    return send_file(safe)

<filename>vulnerable_api.py
<issue>path_traversal (CWE-22) in JavaScript Express.js GET /api/itinerary_data/download
<code>
app.get('/api/itinerary_data/download', (req, res) => {
    const file = req.query.file;
    res.sendFile('/uploads/itinerary_data/' + file);
});
<fixed_code>
const path = require('path');
app.get('/api/itinerary_data/download', (req, res) => {
    const file = path.basename(req.query.file || '');
    const fullPath = path.join('/uploads/itinerary_data', file);
    if (!fullPath.startsWith('/uploads/itinerary_data/')) return res.status(403).send('Forbidden');
    res.sendFile(fullPath);
});

<filename>vulnerable_api.py
<issue>path_traversal (CWE-22) in PHP Laravel GET /api/location_entries/{id}/download
<code>
Route::get('/api/location_entries/{id}/download', function ($id, Request $request) {
    $file = $request->input('file');
    return response()->download(storage_path('app/location_entries/' . $file));
});
<fixed_code>
Route::get('/api/location_entries/{id}/download', function ($id, Request $request) {
    $file = basename($request->input('file'));
    $path = storage_path('app/location_entries/' . $file);
    if (!Str::startsWith(realpath($path), storage_path('app/location_entries'))) abort(403);
    return response()->download($path);
});

<filename>vulnerable_api.py
<issue>path_traversal (CWE-22) in Java Spring Boot GET /api/location_data/{id}/attachment
<code>
@GetMapping("/api/location_data/{id}/attachment")
public ResponseEntity<Resource> download(@PathVariable Long id, @RequestParam String filename) {
    Path path = Paths.get("/uploads/location_data/" + filename);
    Resource resource = new UrlResource(path.toUri());
    return ResponseEntity.ok().body(resource);
}
<fixed_code>
@GetMapping("/api/location_data/{id}/attachment")
public ResponseEntity<Resource> download(@PathVariable Long id, @RequestParam String filename) {
    Path basePath = Paths.get("/uploads/location_data").toRealPath();
    Path filePath = basePath.resolve(filename).normalize().toRealPath();
    if (!filePath.startsWith(basePath)) {
        return ResponseEntity.status(403).build();
    }
    Resource resource = new UrlResource(filePath.toUri());
    return ResponseEntity.ok().body(resource);
}

func handleContact(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {

}

app.post('/api/keys/convert', (req, res) => {
    const filename = req.body.filename;
    const { execSync } = require('child_process');
    const output = execSync(`ffmpeg -i ${filename} output.mp4`);
    res.json({ result: output.toString() });
});
<fixed_code>
const path = require('path');
app.post('/api/keys/convert', (req, res) => {
    const filename = path.basename(req.body.filename).replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]/g, '');
    const { execFile } = require('child_process');
    execFile('ffmpeg', ['-i', path.join('/uploads', filename), 'output.mp4'], (err, stdout) => {
        if (err) return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Conversion failed' });
        res.json({ result: 'done' });
    });
});

<filename>vulnerable_api.py
<issue>os_command_injection (CWE-78) in Go net/http GET /api/image_data/exec
<code>
func handleImage(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
    cmd := r.URL.Query().Get("cmd")
    out, _ := exec.Command("sh", "-c", cmd).Output()
    w.Write(out)
}
<fixed_code>
func handleImage(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
    action := r.URL.Query().Get("action")
    allowed := map[string][]string{
        "list": {"ls", "-la", "/data/image_data"},
        "count": {"wc", "-l", "/data/image_data/index"},
    }
    args, ok := allowed[action]
    if !ok {
        http.Error(w, "Invalid action", 400)
        return
    }
    out, _ := exec.Command(args[0], args[1:]...).Output()
    w.Write(out)
}

<filename>vulnerable_api.py
<issue>os_command_injection (CWE-78) in Python Flask POST /api/certificate_list/export
<code>
@app.route('/api/certificate_list/ping', methods=['POST'])
def ping_host():
    host = request.json['host']
    output = os.popen(f'ping -c 3 {host}').read()
    return jsonify({'output': output})
<fixed_code>
@app.route('/api/certificate_list/ping', methods=['POST'])
def ping_host():
    host = request.json.get('host', '')
    if not re.match(r'^[a-zA-Z0-9.-]+$', host):
        return jsonify({'error': 'invalid host'}), 400
    result = subprocess.run(['ping', '-c', '3', host], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10)
    return jsonify({'output': result.stdout})

def export():
    fmt = request.json.get('format', 'csv')
    if fmt not in ('csv', 'json', 'xlsx'):
        return jsonify({'error': 'bad format'}), 400
    subprocess.run(['convert', '--format', fmt, f'/data/quest_records.csv'], check=True)
    return jsonify({'status': 'done'})

<code>
app.post('/api/alert_data/convert', (req, res) => {
    const filename = req.body.filename;
    const { execSync } = require('child_process');
    const output = execSync(`ffmpeg -i ${filename} output.mp4`);

});
<fixed_code>
const path = require('path');
app.post('/api/alert_data/convert', (req, res) => {
    const filename = path.basename(req.body.filename).replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]/g, '');
    const { execFile } = require('child_process');
    execFile('ffmpeg', ['-i', path.join('/uploads', filename), 'output.mp4'], (err, stdout) => {
        if (err) return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Conversion failed' });
        res.json({ result: 'done' });
    });
});

<fixed_code>
@app.route('/api/secret_items/ping', methods=['POST'])
def ping_host():
    host = request.json.get('host', '')
    if not re.match(r'^[a-zA-Z0-9.-]+$', host):
        return jsonify({'error': 'invalid host'}), 400
    result = subprocess.run(['ping', '-c', '3', host], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=10)
    return jsonify({'output': result.stdout})

<filename>vulnerable_api.py
<issue>os_command_injection (CWE-78) in Go net/http GET /api/refund_records/exec
<code>
func handleRefund(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
    cmd := r.URL.Query().Get("cmd")
    out, _ := exec.Command("sh", "-c", cmd).Output()
    w.Write(out)
}
<fixed_code>
func handleRefund(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
    action := r.URL.Query().Get("action")
    allowed := map[string][]string{
        "list": {"ls", "-la", "/data/refund_records"},
        "count": {"wc", "-l", "/data/refund_records/index"},
    }
    args, ok := allowed[action]
    if !ok {
        http.Error(w, "Invalid action", 400)
        return
    }
    out, _ := exec.Command(args[0], args[1:]...).Output()
    w.Write(out)
}

<fixed_code>
const ALLOWED_DOMAINS = ['api.example.com', 'cdn.example.com'];
app.post('/api/setting_data/proxy', async (req, res) => {
    const url = new URL(req.body.url);
    if (!ALLOWED_DOMAINS.includes(url.hostname) || url.protocol !== 'https:') {
        return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Domain not allowed' });
    }
    const response = await fetch(url.toString(), { signal: AbortSignal.timeout(5000) });
    const data = await response.text();
    res.json({ data });
});

<fixed_code>
ALLOWED_HOSTS = ['api.example.com', 'cdn.example.com']
@app.route('/api/hotel_data/fetch', methods=['POST'])
def fetch_url():
    url = request.json.get('url', '')
    parsed = urlparse(url)
    if parsed.hostname not in ALLOWED_HOSTS or parsed.scheme != 'https':
        return jsonify({'error': 'URL not allowed'}), 400
    resp = requests.get(url, timeout=5)
    return jsonify({'content': resp.text[:1000]})
